text:
There once was a dog who lived on the farm. His owner would often tell funny stories about his adventures. One day he surprised himself. He had fallen into a giant bird's nest. The birds were very angry. They screeched. He scuttled out. One bird spat feathers.

Every time the dog snatched a feather it sang,

"Oh hello. It's Gary. Could you--

Well, never mind. Don't look for company here. I sing alone."

Gary loved birds. He didn't mind the songs. They were like humming melodies.

After many adventures he was discovered. He flew away. Never heard from again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
